decisions_made: MCP server uses stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 pattern
catalog.json is the backing data for the project://catalog resource
Server registered at project level, not user level
phases/ subfolder restructure was explored then reverted
resume_prompt: We are working through Project 06 of the Claude Certified Architect cert. Phases 1 and 2 are complete. Phase 3 is in progress — covering scratchpad files, subagent delegation, /compact, and crash recovery via manifests. Load .scratch/findings.md for specific findings so far.
